name: kindraw
description: Let Claude create real, shareable drawings and diagrams in your Kindraw workspace instead of ASCII art.

api_token.title: Kindraw API token
api_token.description: Generate one at https://kindraw.dev → sign in with GitHub → profile → API tokens. The token has full access to your workspace.

api_base_url.title: API base URL (advanced)
api_base_url.description: Leave as default unless you self-host Kindraw.
